creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
OK. It is a bug, but the bug is in smartd. Either it should allow CAM to do the re-tries, or it should implement its own error recovery.

Also, this was filed against a release that's out of support.

I also use this at work in production on LSI HBAs on thousands of machines with tens of thousands disks and we don't see this.

If it's still an issue, please open a bug with upstream.
